tasks.subject: Task 1: Drawer state — toggle, width, focused-surface
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add drawer module state plus toggle/width/active-surface API; focusedNoteGuid aware of the open drawer.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts; Test app/tests/unit/desktop/drawerState.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/desktop/drawerState.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/desktop/drawerState.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/desktop/drawerState.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["toggleDrawer open/close/switch one-at-a-time", "activeDrawer/isDrawerOpen/closeDrawer", "setDrawerWidth/getDrawerWidth clamp [280,1200]", "drawerWindows empty out-of-range", "focusedNoteGuid follows active surface", "out-of-range no-op"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Surface-aware window ops + move between surfaces
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SurfaceRef + surface-targeted window mutators + moveWindowToSurface (MOVE) + stashToActiveDrawer.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts; Test app/tests/unit/desktop/moveWindowToSurface.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/desktop/moveWindowToSurface.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/desktop/moveWindowToSurface.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/desktop/moveWindowToSurface.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SurfaceRef exported", "moveWindowToSurface MOVE + source pose cached", "per-surface geometry isolation", "*On(ref) ops target named surface", "stashToActiveDrawer + no-op when none open", "missing/non-note guid no-op"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Persistence v4 — drawers + widths, v3 back-compat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persist drawers + widths; VERSION 3→4; v3/v2 back-compat (empty drawers).

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts; Test app/tests/unit/desktop/drawerPersist.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/desktop/drawerPersist.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/desktop/drawerPersist.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/desktop/drawerPersist.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reload restores drawer note + width", "activeDrawer not persisted", "v3 snapshot loads → empty drawers + default width", "deleted drawer guids dropped on load"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: DrawerOverlay component + render integration + F2/F3
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render two slide-in drawer overlays (keep-alive), surface-aware active, NoteWindow surface prop, F2/F3 keys, --z-drawer token.

**Files:** Create app/src/lib/desktop/DrawerOverlay.svelte; Modify NoteWindow.svelte, DesktopWorkspace.svelte, app/src/app.css

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/DrawerOverlay.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/DesktopWorkspace.svelte", "app/src/app.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--z-drawer token (350) below --z-modal", "NoteWindow surface prop routes resize/pin/sendToBack", "F2/F3 toggle left/right", "drawer note renders + draggable + keep-alive on toggle", "canvas active=false when drawer open but mounted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Close button → directional stash arrow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drawer open → canvas note close button becomes ←/→ arrow; click MOVES note into open drawer.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte, DesktopWorkspace.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/DesktopWorkspace.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no drawer → ✕ close unchanged", "drawer open → canvas windows show ←/→, click stashes", "drawer windows keep ✕", "arrow suppressed on drawer's own windows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Drag a canvas window into the open drawer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drag a canvas window over the open drawer panel → move it in at drop point.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/desktop/dragResize.ts, NoteWindow.svelte, DesktopWorkspace.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/dragResize.ts", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/DesktopWorkspace.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["onEnd receives final pointer", "drop inside open drawer moves note at drop point", "release outside → normal canvas move", "no drawer open → no effect"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Guide card + full verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 설정 → 가이드 (env) card for F2/F3 drawers; run full check + test.

**Files:** Modify app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check && npm run test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["drawer guide-card in env sub-tab matching pattern", "npm run check 0 errors", "npm run test all pass"]}
```
